SEARCH
Package xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util

Class BlockMapPersistentDataType

java.lang.Object
xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.BlockMapPersistentDataType
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.persistence.PersistentDataType<byte[],Map<org.bukkit.Location,BaseBlock>>
public final class BlockMapPersistentDataType extends Object implements org.bukkit.persistence.PersistentDataType<byte[],Map<org.bukkit.Location,BaseBlock>>
A PersistentDataType for storing and retrieving Map<Location, BaseBlock>.

Each entry stores:

  • Location — world UUID (nullable), x, y, z, yaw, pitch
  • BaseBlock — fully-qualified class name; reconstructed via public no-arg constructor

Writing:


   Map<Location, BaseBlock> blocks = new HashMap<>();
   blocks.put(someLocation, someBaseBlock);

   pdc.set(key, BlockMapPersistentDataType.INSTANCE, blocks);

Reading:


   Map<Location, BaseBlock> blocks = pdc.get(key, BlockMapPersistentDataType.INSTANCE);
   if (blocks != null) {
       BaseBlock block = blocks.get(someLocation);
   }

BaseBlock contract:

Every concrete BaseBlock implementation must expose a public no-arg constructor. The class is identified by its fully-qualified name; renaming or moving the class will break existing stored data.
